'''âr-s-sh''' ('''karasash''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:knive|knive]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| r-s-sh
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:knive|knive]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âr-s-sh
|-
! Lemma
| karasash
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thirasash|thirasash]] || [[word:jirasash|jirasash]] || [[word:shirasash|shirasash]] || [[word:kirasash|kirasash]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthurasash|thuthurasash]] || [[word:jujurasash|jujurasash]] || [[word:shushurasash|shushurasash]] || [[word:kukurasash|kukurasash]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thurasash|thurasash]] || [[word:jurasash|jurasash]] || [[word:shurasash|shurasash]] || [[word:kurasash|kurasash]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thurasash|thurasash]] || [[word:jurasash|jurasash]] || [[word:shurasash|shurasash]] || [[word:kurasash|kurasash]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:therasash|therasash]] || [[word:jerasash|jerasash]] || [[word:sherasash|sherasash]] || [[word:kerasash|kerasash]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothorasash|thothorasash]] || [[word:jojorasash|jojorasash]] || [[word:shoshorasash|shoshorasash]] || [[word:kokorasash|kokorasash]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thorasash|thorasash]] || [[word:jorasash|jorasash]] || [[word:shorasash|shorasash]] || [[word:korasash|korasash]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thorasash|thorasash]] || [[word:jorasash|jorasash]] || [[word:shorasash|shorasash]] || [[word:korasash|korasash]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠrasash|thĂŠrasash]] || [[word:jĂŠrasash|jĂŠrasash]] || [[word:shĂŠrasash|shĂŠrasash]] || [[word:kĂŠrasash|kĂŠrasash]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thatharasash|thatharasash]] || [[word:jajarasash|jajarasash]] || [[word:shasharasash|shasharasash]] || [[word:kakarasash|kakarasash]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:tharasash|tharasash]] || [[word:jarasash|jarasash]] || [[word:sharasash|sharasash]] || [[word:karasash|karasash]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:tharasash|tharasash]] || [[word:jarasash|jarasash]] || [[word:sharasash|sharasash]] || [[word:karasash|karasash]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:sharasash|sharasash]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:gosharasash|gosharasash]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokisharasash|gokisharasash]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:sharasashnĂŒ|sharasashnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:gosharasashnknĂŒ|gosharasashnknĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokisharasashnĂŒ|gokisharasashnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:sharasashĂ«|sharasashĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gosharasashnkshĂ«|gosharasashnkshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokisharasashĂ«|gokisharasashĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:sharasashro|sharasashro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gosharasashnkro|gosharasashnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokisharasashro|gokisharasashro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:sharasashmu|sharasashmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gosharasashnkmu|gosharasashnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokisharasashmu|gokisharasashmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:sharasasher|sharasasher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gosharasashnksher|gosharasashnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokisharasasher|gokisharasasher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:sharasashng|sharasashng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gosharasashnkng|gosharasashnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokisharasashng|gokisharasashng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:sharasashya|sharasashya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gosharasashnkya|gosharasashnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokisharasashya|gokisharasashya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:sharasashyam|sharasashyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gosharasashnkyam|gosharasashnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokisharasashyam|gokisharasashyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:sharasashnĂŒshĂ«|sharasashnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gosharasashnknĂŒshĂ«|gosharasashnknĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokisharasashnĂŒshĂ«|gokisharasashnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:sharasashnĂŒro|sharasashnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gosharasashnknĂŒro|gosharasashnknĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokisharasashnĂŒro|gokisharasashnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:sharasashnĂŒmu|sharasashnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gosharasashnknĂŒmu|gosharasashnknĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokisharasashnĂŒmu|gokisharasashnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:sharasashĂ«nĂŒ|sharasashĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gosharasashnkshĂ«nĂŒ|gosharasashnkshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokisharasashĂ«nĂŒ|gokisharasashĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:sharasashĂ«ro|sharasashĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gosharasashnkshĂ«ro|gosharasashnkshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokisharasashĂ«ro|gokisharasashĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:sharasashĂ«mu|sharasashĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gosharasashnkshĂ«mu|gosharasashnkshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokisharasashĂ«mu|gokisharasashĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:sharasashronĂŒ|sharasashronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gosharasashnkronĂŒ|gosharasashnkronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokisharasashronĂŒ|gokisharasashronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:sharasashroshĂ«|sharasashroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gosharasashnkroshĂ«|gosharasashnkroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokisharasashroshĂ«|gokisharasashroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:sharasashromu|sharasashromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gosharasashnkromu|gosharasashnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokisharasashromu|gokisharasashromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:sharasashmunĂŒ|sharasashmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gosharasashnkmunĂŒ|gosharasashnkmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokisharasashmunĂŒ|gokisharasashmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:sharasashmushĂ«|sharasashmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gosharasashnkmushĂ«|gosharasashnkmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokisharasashmushĂ«|gokisharasashmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:sharasashmuro|sharasashmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gosharasashnkmuro|gosharasashnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokisharasashmuro|gokisharasashmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]
